summary.intent: Address PR review comments on #525 for the gpg-sign-releases feature, fixing three identified issues in the shell script and documentation.
summary.outcome: All three review comments were resolved: SHA256 verification failure handling, --clobber silent overwrite behavior, and the KEY_FINGERPRINT placeholder documentation. Changes were committed and PR conversations resolved.

repo: Release signing workflow lives in scripts/gpg-sign-release.sh with accompanying docs in docs/src/release-verification.md
PR review process uses GitHub conversation resolution after fixes are committed

code.finding: SHA256 verification was silently skipped when download failed — required explicit error handling
--clobber flag silently overwrote existing signatures without warning — needed guard or user notification
<KEY_FINGERPRINT> placeholder had no canonical source documented — needed authoritative reference added

workflow: Three-priority review system used (P1/P2) to triage comment severity before fixing
Files read before editing to understand context — both the script and docs were reviewed together
